name: spec.read_declared_files
description: Read the current contents of files declared in a scafld spec before bounded fix authoring.

spec_contents.description: Full scafld spec YAML contents to inspect for declared file paths.

repo_root.description: Repository or workspace root; defaults to fixture, project, RUNX_CWD, or the current working directory.

fixture.description: Workspace root forwarded from chain inputs when repo_root is omitted.
